About Us
Glebe Centre Community Programs at Abbotsford
Careers

Join a team that’s passionate about supporting older adults with care, dignity, and respect. At The Glebe Centre, we offer meaningful work in a collaborative, community-focused environment — whether in long-term care or our dynamic seniors’ centre.

Current Opportunities

We'd love to welcome you to our team.

Temporary part-time
Registered Dietitian — Temporary Part-Time, 3 days per week
$40.00-$50.00/hour As per Non-Union 
The Glebe Centre is seeking a Registered Dietitian to provide nutrition assessments and care planning for residents. As a member of the Food Services team the RD implements best practices to promote the health and wellbeing of Residents and upholds the Glebe Centre’s mission vision and values.
View Full Posting
Volunteer Position
Volunteer Board Members
The Glebe Centre is seeking four volunteer Board members to join its dedicated governance team. 
View Full Posting
We'd love to hear from you!

Whether you have questions, need more information, or want to get in touch with a specific department, The Glebe Centre is here to help.
